# GitHub Templates

Issue and PR templates for the GenAI Engineering Hub.

## Files

- [bug-report.md](.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug-report.md)
- [content-proposal.md](.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/content-proposal.md)
- [PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md](.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md)

These are auto-loaded by GitHub when contributors open issues/PRs.
